name: Zhiyun Weebill S Handheld Gimbal Stabilizer
description: The Zhiyun-Tech WEEBILL-S incorporates the underslung mode design of its predecessor, the WEEBILL LAB, and also has a more compact form as well as other new features.

features.Key Features:: Rear Underslung Handle in Compact Design | Highly Upgraded Motors and Algorithm | Support for Optional Transmission Module | Updated ZY Play App Features | Six Modes of Operation | Up to 14-Hour Battery Operating Time | Electronic Focus Control Where Supported | Optional Focus/Zoom Motors Supported | Arca Swiss/Manfrotto Quick Release Plate | Supports All TransMount Accessories
features.What's in the box?: Zhiyun WEEBILL-S Handheld Gimbal Stabilizer | 2 x 18650 Lithium-Ion Battery | Charger | Quick Release Plate Assembly | USB-C Cable | Micro-USB to Micro-USB Cable | Micro-USB to Mini-USB Cable | Micro-USB to USB-C Cable | Sony Camera Control Cable | Mini Tripod | Backing Base | Cable Case | Storage Case | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
